since_last: 57% of 86 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.50%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.41% · BTC -2.57% · Gold -2.03% · Nasdaq100 +0.31%. 57% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.50%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.50%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: OKLO is the standout at -4.84%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +4.13%, ZBRA +3.38%, PUBM +3.04%, WDAY +2.57%, INTU +2.55%. Laggards: OKLO -4.84%, OKLO -4.84%, SMR -4.33%, QCOM -3.87%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.71% at $157.22
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.71% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
